components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1c1c1d; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: sans-serif; font-weight: 700; border: 4px solid #1c1c1d; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #1c1c1d; transform: translateY(-2px); transition: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0px); box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #1c1c1d; }

narrative.overview: MCSkinEngine.dev's design system is a high-contrast voxel studio built on architectural contrast: monochrome chrome serves technical precision while saturated flat pastel block-forms organize parameter inputs.
keyCharacteristics: Saturated flat pastel color blocks clearly separating layout sections.
Pill buttons for all text CTAs, and circular icon buttons.
Negative-tracked display sans for a strong editorial visual hierarchy.
Spaced bento blocks separated by white margins to let layouts breathe.

rules.name: The Color-Block Rhythm Rule
rules.body: All color blocks are separated by segments of white canvas (#ffffff) to avoid color overload and create breathing room.

rules.name: The Flat & Tactile Rule
rules.body: Elements sit flat on the surface at rest. Actionable elements offset downward by 2px on click rather than showing depth shadows.

dos: Do wrap every text CTA button in a pill-shaped outline (rounded.pill).
Do separate color blocks with a white margin to ensure pacing.
Do use negative letter-spacing on display type sizes to add editorial weight.
donts: Don't use square or sharp corners on buttons.
Don't use drop-shadows or gradients on color blocks.
Don't introduce mid-gray text values; let weights differentiate hierarchy.
